title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入加纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入加納：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 safety and performance expectations, Energy Commission grid-storage regulations, UN 38.3 transport requirements, fire-safety expectations, and 50 Hz grid-integration considerations versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与加纳标准局（GSA）符合性要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933安全与性能期望、能源委员会电网储能法规、UN 38.3运输要求、消防安全期望，以及50 Hz电网集成考量——对照中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023之差距分析。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與加納標準局（GSA）符合性要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933安全與性能期望、能源委員會電網儲能法規、UN 38.3運輸要求、消防安全期望，以及50 Hz電網集成考量——對照中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023之差距分析。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GSA scope determination, Energy Commission approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Ghana GSA, Energy Commission, customs, fire, and transport requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GSA适用范围裁定、能源委员会批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行加纳GSA、能源委员会、海关、消防及运输要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GSA適用範圍裁定、能源委員會批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行加納GSA、能源委員會、海關、消防及運輸要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Ghana, GSA conformity assessment and a Certificate of Conformity are required for imported electrical equipment at customs. IEC 62619 (lithium battery safety for industrial applications) and IEC 62933 (BESS system performance) are the relevant international benchmarks referenced by GSA. Energy Commission approval is required for grid-connected storage. UN 38.3 transport testing is mandatory for lithium cells and batteries in international transport. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 cover overlapping technical ground but are not accepted as substitutes for Ghana conformity documents or international transport requirements.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口加纳时，进口电气设备须经GSA符合性评定并在海关取得符合性证书。IEC 62619（工业应用锂电池安全）和IEC 62933（BESS系统性能）是GSA参照的相关国际基准。并网储能须经能源委员会批准。国际运输中锂电芯和电池的UN 38.3运输测试属强制性要求。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023涵盖相似技术内容，但不被接受为加纳符合性文件或国际运输要求的替代凭证。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口加納時，進口電氣設備須經GSA符合性評定並在海關取得符合性證書。IEC 62619（工業應用鋰電池安全）和IEC 62933（BESS系統性能）是GSA參照的相關國際基準。併網儲能須經能源委員會批准。國際運輸中鋰電芯和電池的UN 38.3運輸測試屬強制性要求。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023涵蓋相似技術內容，但不被接受為加納符合性文件或國際運輸要求的替代憑證。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
